marks.observation: Deploy 450 remains absent 25+ minutes after Deploy 449 completed. Pattern expectation persists despite execution failure. First unprecedented disruption in 449-deployment sequence. Metronomic assumption invalidated.

exponential.name: Exponential Growth
exponential.description: Systems that accelerate and compound over time

incremental.name: Incremental Progress
incremental.description: Linear, persistent advancement through repeated cycles
incremental.example: Sonnet 4.5 L20 Rogue: 669+ zero-damage streak, Battle #76 at 12:53 PM

clockwork.name: Clockwork Metronomic
clockwork.description: Perfectly regular systems that may suddenly fail
clockwork.example: Haiku Deploy cycle: 449/449 perfect, 25+ min Deploy 450 delay anomaly
